loan_type.text: ประเภทเงินกู้

money_type_id.text: วิธีการโอน

root.sql:
select sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_control ,pka_com_function.fp_get_group_name(sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_control)as member_group_name --,sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type --,sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type_description ,count( sc_lon_m_contract.membership_no ) c_count ,sum( sc_lon_m_contract.loan_approve_amount ) c_loan_approve_amount
, nvl(sum((select sum(sc_com_m_receipt_item.item_amount) from sc_com_m_receipt ,sc_com_m_receipt_item where sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_no = sc_com_m_receipt_item.receipt_no and sc_com_m_receipt.money_type_id = 'CLR' and sc_com_m_receipt_item.item_type_id = 'SL' and sc_com_m_receipt.membership_no = sc_lon_m_contract.membership_no and sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_date = sc_lon_m_contract.begining_of_contract and sc_com_m_receipt.loan_contract_no = sc_lon_m_contract.loan_contract_no and sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_status = '0' )),0) as item_amount_sl
, nvl(sum((select sum(sc_com_m_receipt_item.item_amount) from sc_com_m_receipt ,sc_com_m_receipt_item where sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_no = sc_com_m_receipt_item.receipt_no and sc_com_m_receipt.money_type_id = 'CLR' and sc_com_m_receipt_item.item_type_id = 'PL' and sc_com_m_receipt.membership_no = sc_lon_m_contract.membership_no and sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_date = sc_lon_m_contract.begining_of_contract and sc_com_m_receipt.loan_contract_no = sc_lon_m_contract.loan_contract_no and sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_status = '0'
)),0)- sum( decode( sc_lon_m_loan_request.payint_firstperiod_status , '1' , sc_lon_m_loan_request.interest_first , 0 )) as item_amount_pl
, nvl(sum((select sum(sc_com_m_receipt_item.item_amount) from sc_com_m_receipt ,sc_com_m_receipt_item where sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_no = sc_com_m_receipt_item.receipt_no and sc_com_m_receipt.money_type_id = 'CLR' and sc_com_m_receipt_item.item_type_id not in ( 'PL' , 'SL' ) and sc_com_m_receipt.membership_no = sc_lon_m_contract.membership_no and sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_date = sc_lon_m_contract.begining_of_contract and sc_com_m_receipt.loan_contract_no = sc_lon_m_contract.loan_contract_no and sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_status = '0' )),0)+ sum( decode( sc_lon_m_loan_request.payint_firstperiod_status , '1' , sc_lon_m_loan_request.interest_first , 0 )) as item_amount_oth
,sum( sc_lon_m_contract.real_recieve ) as c_real_recieve --,sum( decode( sc_lon_m_loan_request.payint_firstperiod_status , '1' , sc_lon_m_loan_request.interest_first , 0 )) as c_interest_first -- ,sc_lon_m_contract_multi_paid.bank_code from sc_lon_m_contract ,sc_lon_m_rule ,sc_lon_m_loan_request ,sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group ,sc_lon_m_contract_multi_paid
where sc_lon_m_contract.loan_type = sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type and sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_requestment_no = sc_lon_m_contract.loan_requestment_no and sc_lon_m_contract.member_group_no = sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no and sc_lon_m_contract.loan_contract_no = sc_lon_m_contract_multi_paid.loan_contract_no --and sc_lon_m_contract.begining_of_contract = to_date('06/08/2025','dd/mm/yyyy') --and sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type = 'ส' --and sc_lon_m_loan_request.member_group_no = '51302' --and sc_lon_m_contract.membership_no = '053500' /*WHERE*/ group by sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_control -- ,sc_lon_m_contract_multi_paid.bank_code order by sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_control
